messages.content: how do I phrase that Germela meets expectations of job performance
Germela consistently meets or exceeds job performance expectations.
How do I say Germela is good with teamwork
Germela demonstrates excellent teamwork skills.
Germela has good communication skills
Germela possesses strong communication skills.
Germela treats patients as individuals
Germela consistently demonstrates a personalized and patient-centric approach in her dealings with individuals.
how do I say Germela remains calm under stressful situations
Germela maintains a calm and composed demeanor even in high-pressure or stressful situations.
how do I phrase that Germela makes good decisions in caring for her patients
Germela consistently makes sound and effective decisions in providing care for her patients.
Germela needs improvement with delegation
Germela may benefit from further developing her delegation skills.
Phrase to say Germela needs to build confidence in her job as a nurse
Germela would benefit from actively building her confidence in her role as a nurse.
phrases that say Dawn understands expectations of her role as a leader
Dawn displays a clear understanding of the expectations that come with her role as a leader.
Phrases that say Dawn performs her job responsibilities well but is still learning
Dawn consistently performs her job responsibilities effectively while also proactively seeking opportunities for growth and learning.
